title: JEI-Left Overlay
description: The overlay of JEI with all the ingredients is facilitated by the mod on the left side of the screen.
body:
This mod adjusts the position of the item overlay from Just Enough Items (JEI) by moving it to the left side of the screen. It is especially useful for players who use other mods or interfaces that overlap with JEI’s default right-side layout.

By relocating the overlay, the mod improves screen organization and prevents clutter, making it easier to browse items and recipes without interference. It works seamlessly in the background and requires no complex configuration, providing a simple but effective quality-of-life improvement for modded gameplay.

Perfect for customized UI setups, this mod ensures a cleaner and more comfortable experience when using JEI.
